Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Someone seems to be[n]cleaning the restroom.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I enter the restroom...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, you can't come in here! I'm still scrubbing the floors.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...Huh? You're not here to use the toilet?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ohhh, okay! So you're here to help out, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wow! You even brought your own brush? You really came prepared, didn'tcha?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Well, all right, then! Why don'tcha start from the other corner?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like I'll be helping the cleaning lady.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}One tile just won't get clean...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}No matter how hard I scrub,[n]the grime won't come off...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I do...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Even with soap on the brush,[n]the grime won't come off...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I do...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I gave it all my strength, and[n]the grime is beginning to lift![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The tile is completely clean![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Just as I was about to throw in[n]the towel, the grime began to lift![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The tile is completely clean![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wow! You could eat off that floor![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Do you help clean the school restrooms after lunch or something? You really know your stuff![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks, kid! Just leave the rest of it to me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I successfully helped clean the restroom...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry, kid. I've only got the one brush here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you really wanna help, you'll hafta come back with your own cleaning supplies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I had my own cleaning equipment,[n]maybe I could help her...[n]{f 1 1}
